# Instrument of the Bards, Canaith Mandolin

An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 2d4 Psychic damage.

You can play the Canaith Mandolin to cast one of the following spells: [[fly]], [[invisibility]], [[levitate]], [[protection-from-evil-and-good|Protection from Evil and Good]], [[cure-wounds|Cure Wounds]] (level 3), [[dispel-magic|Dispel Magic]], and [[protection-from-energy|Protection from Energy]] (Lightning damage only). Once the Canaith Mandolin has been used to cast a spell, it can't be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn. The spells use your spellcasting ability and spell save DC.
